messages.subject: Final reminder: pipevine.example renews in 14 days
messages.snippet: Your domain pipevine.example will auto-renew on 2026-06-01. Charge: $44.99 USD. Reply STOP to cancel auto-renewal.

messages.subject: Re: Q3 pilot — pricing question
messages.snippet: Hi Alex — could you confirm whether the $19/mo tier covers our 12 seats, or do we need the enterprise quote you mentioned last week? Need to close this internally by Friday.

messages.subject: Weekly briefing: the platform tax debate
messages.snippet: This week's piece looks at the renewed antitrust pressure on app-store fees.
